consensus.overall_description: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched collegiate lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket and collar, white-striped sleeve cuffs, and a Black Rose Collection woven patch near the hem.

consensus.stitching_details: clean seams throughout, white piping sewn along button placket and neckline
